whyChoose.title: Why Choose Oulify

items.title: Fast delivery (7-14 days)
items.description: We move quickly without compromising quality, so you can start getting results sooner.

items.title: Clear pricing, no surprises
items.description: Fixed scope and transparent pricing before we begin. What you see is what you pay.

items.title: Built for results, not just design

items.title: Focused on real business needs

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Straight answers about timelines, pricing, SEO, support, and how we work.

items.question: What services do you offer for digital solutions?
items.answer: We provide complete digital solutions including website development, mobile app development, automation systems, digital marketing, and SaaS demo videos to help businesses grow online.

items.question: How long does it take to build a website or mobile app?
items.answer: Most business websites and landing pages are completed within 7-14 days, while mobile apps and more complex systems may take longer depending on the features.

items.question: How much does website development cost?
items.answer: The cost of website development depends on your requirements. We offer clear, fixed pricing with no hidden fees, so you know exactly what you are paying for.

items.question: Do you create SEO-friendly websites?
items.answer: Yes. All our websites are built with SEO best practices, including fast loading speed, mobile responsiveness, and an optimized structure to help you rank better on Google.

items.question: Can you help my business get more customers online?
items.answer: Yes. We design high-converting websites and digital marketing strategies that help attract visitors and turn them into customers.

items.question: Do you offer digital marketing services?
items.answer: Yes. We provide digital marketing services including SEO, social media ads, and analytics setup to improve visibility and drive traffic.

items.question: Can you redesign or improve my existing website?
items.answer: Yes. We can redesign your current website to improve user experience, speed, SEO performance, and conversion rate.

items.question: Do you provide support after the project is completed?
items.answer: Yes. We offer ongoing support and updates to help your website or app continue performing well after launch.

items.question: Do you work with international clients?
items.answer: Yes. We work remotely with clients across Finland, Europe, and worldwide.

items.question: How do I get started with your services?
items.answer: Click "Start your project" or send a message through the contact form. We usually reply within 24 hours.

aboutPage.title: About Oulify
aboutPage.intro: We are a small digital team focused on building simple, effective solutions for real business problems.

whyStarted.title: Why we started
paragraphs: Oulify was created with a simple idea: most businesses do not need complex systems, they need solutions that actually work.
We saw too many websites and apps that looked good but did not bring real results, so we decided to build digital products that are clear, practical, and made for real use.

howWeWork.title: How we work
paragraphs: We keep things simple and direct.
You work closely with the person building your project. We focus on clear communication, fast execution, and making sure everything delivers real value.
No unnecessary complexity, just a smooth and focused process from start to finish.

whatWeCareAbout.title: What we care about
items: Building solutions that are useful in real situations
Making sure your investment brings real value

mission.label: Our mission
mission.description: To build simple, effective digital solutions that help businesses grow without unnecessary complexity.

vision.label: Our vision
vision.description: To make high-quality digital products accessible to businesses of all sizes.

whereWeWork.title: Where we work
paragraphs: We work remotely with clients across different cities and countries, keeping communication simple and efficient.
